articles.title: Gold, Silver Rate Today Live Updates: International gold slips as Middle East tensions push crude higher
articles.summary: The precious metals market is balancing two competing forces, rising geopolitical uncertainty and expectations of tighter monetary policy. Fresh US airstrikes against Iran following attacks on American-linked installations in Jordan have intensified tensions in the Middle East, keeping investors alert.

articles.title: DU BTech Admission 2026 round 3 seat allotment out, July 21 deadline to accept seats: Check direct link here
articles.summary: Delhi University has announced the Round 3 seat allotment results for BTech Admissions 2026 on its admission portal. Candidates can check their allocation status by logging into their dashboards using their JEE credentials.

articles.title: AP EAPCET counselling 2026 likely to begin today: Check complete details here
articles.summary: The AP EAPCET 2026 Phase 1 counselling registration is set to begin on July 20 for admissions to undergraduate engineering programmes in Andhra Pradesh. Eligible candidates must complete online registration, upload documents, and pay the processing fee by July 29.

articles.title: UPTET Result 2026 expected soon as UPESSC completes final evaluation process
articles.summary: UPTET Result 2026 is expected to be announced soon by the Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission. Lakhs of candidates who appeared for the teacher eligibility examination are waiting for their scorecards and merit list PDF.

articles.title: Kerala declares Monday holiday for schools and colleges after FIFA World Cup 2026 final
articles.summary: Kerala has declared a holiday for all educational institutions on Monday ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 final between Argentina and Spain. The decision was taken considering the match's late-night schedule, which could make it difficult for students to attend morning classes.
